title: Support vpiDefName module names
body:
Currently I don't think there's any way to get the module name from the verilated cpp. You can get the instance name, and the path, but the actual module name is baked into the cpp class, and is not in the scope data.

I think we could put the module name in with ScopeData for vpi modules, and hence also put that in VerilatedScope. generate scopes would be blank, and top scopes would have a repeat of the name.
